# MCP Builder Skill

This directory contains scripts and templates for scaffolding and validating Model Context Protocol (MCP) server projects.

## Contents

- `SKILL.md`: Skill manifest and usage
- `scripts/`: Automation scripts
  - `create-mcp-project.sh`: Scaffold new MCP projects
  - `validate_mcp.py`: Validate MCP compliance
- `templates/`: Starter project templates (Rust, etc.)

See SKILL.md for details.
